projects.ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.ecommerce.desc: A full-featured online store with cart management, Stripe payments, real-time inventory, and a sleek admin dashboard. Built for performance.
projects.portfolio.title: Developer Portfolio
projects.portfolio.desc: Personal portfolio built with Next.js and TailwindCSS — featuring smooth animations, dark theme, interactive skills network, and a fully responsive layout.
projects.taskmanager.title: Task Manager
projects.taskmanager.desc: A sleek task management app with drag & drop reordering, priority levels, local storage persistence, and dark mode. Built with a focus on clean UX and smooth interactions.
